title: Too Hard to Swallow
label: Jive Records
note_ru: Дебютный альбом. Грубый, сырой саут-хоп с фирменными басами Pimp C.
note_en: Debut album. Raw, gritty Southern hop with Pimp C's signature bass.

title: Super Tight
label: Jive Records
note_ru: Gold certification. Пробой в национальный эфир, но звук всё ещё 100% техасский.
note_en: Gold certification. Break into national airplay, but the sound is still 100% Texan.

title: Ridin' Dirty
label: Jive Records
note_ru: Классика. Platinum. Candy paint, chrome spinners, purple drank — UGK задали каноны.
note_en: Classic. Platinum. Candy paint, chrome spinners, purple drank — UGK set the standards.

title: Dirty Money
label: Jive Records
note_ru: Реванш после паузы. Жёстче, политичнее, злее.
note_en: Comeback after the pause. Harder, more political, angrier.

title: Underground Kingz
label: Jive Records
note_ru: Двойной альбом. #1 Billboard 200. Включает «International Players Anthem» с Outkast.
note_en: Double album. #1 Billboard 200. Includes "International Players Anthem" with OutKast.

title: UGK 4 Life
label: Jive Records
note_ru: Посмертный релиз. Pimp C не дожил. Bun B закончил за двоих.
note_en: Posthumous release. Pimp C didn't live to see it. Bun B finished for both of them.
essential: Da Game Been Good to Me
